title: cytisus supinus subsp. capitatus
intro: Cytisus supinus subsp. capitatus, also known as Rock broom or Greek broom, is a perennial shrub belonging to the Fabaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits associated with Cytisus supinus subsp. capitatus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Cytisus supinus subsp. capitatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for those seeking natural remedies.
